beatFlagged.headline: Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader?
beatFlagged.description: Many expect the 56-year-old, who has largely kept a low profile, to continue his father's hardline policies.

beatFlagged.headline: US missile hit military base near Iran school, video analysis shows
beatFlagged.description: A US Tomahawk missile hit a military base near a primary school in southern Iran where Iranian authorities said 168 people were killed, expert video analysis shows.
